# saveoutput

```text
usage: saveoutput [-h] ...

```

Save the output of a debugger command for later diffing.
### Positional arguments

|Positional Argument|Help|
| :--- | :--- |
|args|Command plus arguments to execute and save output|

### Optional arguments

|Short|Long|Help|
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
|-h|--help|show this help message and exit|
